demonstrated that the

neurologic abnormalities, were significantly increased among infants exposed to an ACEi in the first trimester compared to those without exposure to antihypertensive drugs. first-trimester hypertension.<sup>68</sup> However, the limitation of most of the studies that showed a negative association with first-trimester exposure is that they did not account for malformations among miscarriages, pregnancy terminations, or stillbirth.
